metrics_recommendations.description: Recommend metrics, KPIs, and causal drivers for a training or compliance area
use_cases: Expand a KPI catalog for a new compliance program
Choose leading/lagging indicators for L&D scorecards
Align metrics to business outcomes before dashboard build
examples: What KPIs should we track for mandatory safety training completion?
Recommend metrics that explain low certification rates by region

causal_analysis.description: Understand causal relationships between training inputs and business outcomes
use_cases: Explain how engagement drivers connect to completion
Support audit narratives with driver logic
examples: How does assignment timeliness relate to final certification?
What training signals best predict audit findings?

dashboard_generation.description: Build a visual dashboard for a specific persona and training area
use_cases: Learning ops console for overdue training
examples: Build a compliance officer dashboard for certification lapses
Director view: training cost and completion trends

adhoc_data_questions.description: Answer specific data questions with SQL or direct queries — no dashboard, no recommendations
use_cases: Validate a number before a meeting
examples: How many learners completed course X last week?
List employees out of compliance in department Y

data_discovery.description: Explore available schemas, tables, and data assets to understand what analysis is possible from your configured data sources
use_cases: Find coverage gaps for a use case
examples: What tables do we have for compliance training?
What can I build with my current CSOD connection?

data_lineage.description: Trace where a metric or KPI comes from — from source tables through bronze, silver, and gold layers
examples: Where does completion rate on the exec dashboard come from?
Trace this KPI back to raw extracts

data_quality_analysis.description: Assess completeness, freshness, consistency, and accuracy of your training data before running analysis
examples: Is last month’s assignment data complete enough to report?
Check freshness and null rates for certification facts

data_planner.description: Generate a complete data engineering plan — ingestion specs, medallion architecture, dbt model specs, dependency DAG
use_cases: Add a source to the lakehouse
Plan dbt models for new KPIs
examples: Plan bronze→silver→gold for course completions and certs
What dbt models do we need for compliance training KPIs?

discovery.description: Explore what data, metrics, and schemas are available for a topic
use_cases: Find relevant assets for a keyword
examples: What do we have on onboarding completion?
Show available metrics for compliance training

reports.description: Generate a formatted report (PDF, Excel, scheduled) for a training area
examples: PDF report of overdue training by org for Q2
Excel export of certification status by role

automations.description: Set up automated alerts, triggers, or scheduled workflows based on training data
use_cases: Alert when completion drops below threshold
examples: Email learning admins when department completion < 90%
Schedule a daily compliance training status job

use_case_analysis.description: Analyze and define business use cases and requirements
examples: Define use cases for global compliance training analytics
What questions should the new L&D dashboard answer?

sql_analysis.description: Generate and analyze SQL queries for data exploration
examples: Write SQL for learners with two overdue courses
Aggregate completion by cost center for last 90 days

dashboard_recommendations.description: Recommend dashboard layouts, visualizations, and designs
use_cases: Choose chart types and layout patterns
examples: Recommend widgets for a manager team compliance view
What visuals work best for trend + benchmark?

report_recommendations.description: Recommend report formats, structures, and content
examples: Outline a quarterly compliance training report for legal
What should an Excel compliance pack include?

alerts.description: Set up alerts, thresholds, and monitoring configurations
examples: Alert if certification expirations exceed 50 in a week
Monitor daily new overdue assignments
What should we do about the spike in overdue safety training?
Top three insights from last month’s completion trends

compliance_reporting.description: Compliance-focused reporting and due date tracking
examples: Report on employees missing deadlines this quarter
Compliance training status by policy and region

data_intelligence.label: Data Intelligence
data_intelligence.description: Foundational data understanding — underlies all four analytical modes
use_cases: Establish trust and coverage before analytics
Reuse across planner, advisor, and compliance flows

lineage_subject.label: Lineage Subject
lineage_subject.description: Name of metric, KPI, or table to trace

analysis_goal.label: Analysis Goal
analysis_goal.description: Describe the analysis you want to run so the planner can design the right pipeline
